# godaddy_dns_record_set (Resource)

Manage one GoDaddy DNS RRset.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) Domain that owns the RRset.
- `records` (Attributes List) Normalized records owned by the RRset. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--records))
- `type` (String) RRset type. Supported: A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, SRV, TXT.

### Optional

- `name` (String) RRset name. Defaults to `@`.

### Read-Only

- `fqdn` (String) Fully qualified domain name for the RRset.
- `id` (String) Canonical resource identifier in `domain,type,name` format.

<a id="nestedatt--records"></a>
### Nested Schema for `records`

Required:

- `data` (String) Record target/value.

Optional:

- `port` (Number) SRV port.
- `priority` (Number) MX/SRV priority.
- `protocol` (String) SRV protocol.
- `service` (String) SRV service.
- `ttl` (Number) Time to live in seconds.
- `weight` (Number) SRV weight.
